data.body: Landed-state evidence (origin/main @ my merged stack): (1) The P0 invalid bare form is GONE — grep 'session-log "' over README.md + docs/ finds nothing. (2) This ticket fixed the README line (rebar session-log append), then sibling b5a4 (supersedes) replaced the whole ## CLI command catalog with a link to the generated docs/cli-reference.md; so the corrected, always-current session-log usage now lives at docs/cli-reference.md '### session-log' -> 'Usage: rebar session-log <append "<entry>" | start> …', and docs/user-guide.md shows 'rebar session-log append'. (3) README's ## CLI section links to docs/cli-reference.md. The P0 onboarding defect (users copy-pasting an invalid command) is fully resolved — better than the original inline line, since the generated reference cannot drift. a41f's original in-README AC was superseded by the epic's own catalog->generated-ref refactor (b5a4).
